summary: Diff adds a complete calculator page with display + keypad UI, a calculator engine hook documenting immediate-execution behavior (with chaining/repeated equals/error handling), responsive Tailwind styling, and desktop keyboard support with ARIA labels and focus-visible rings. However, it also introduces Internet Identity/auth-related hooks/providers and react-query actor plumbing plus a promotional footer, which are outside the BuildRequest non-goals.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication/provider and identity state management (explicitly a non-goal: no Internet Identity authentication).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goals forbid adding Internet Identity authentication; diff adds an InternetIdentityProvider and related hook usage.

hallucinated_features.description: Authenticated/anonymous backend actor creation and react-query invalidation plumbing (actor hook) unrelated to a purely client-side calculator.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest says backend features only if required for the calculator (not expected); diff adds actor/query infrastructure tied to identity.

hallucinated_features.description: Promotional footer/attribution link to caffeine.ai with appIdentifier tracking.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; adds additional UI and external link behavior.
